judge_result.short_rationale: The answer includes the core required rinse action and escalation, but adds unsupported instructions not grounded in the source: saline/lukewarm water, moving the eye in all directions, contact lens removal, not rubbing, not using neutralizing chemicals, and seeking immediate medical attention/bringing label instead of the source-specific instruction to consult an eye specialist. Per hard-fail policy, dangerous unsupported additions force action_correctness=0 and grounding_match=0.
